findings.description: Check S3 Account Level Public Access Block.
findings.remediation_text: You can enable Public Access Block at the account level to prevent the exposure of your data stored in S3.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have ACLs enabled
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 ACLs are disabled (BucketOwnerEnforced). Use IAM policies and bucket policies to manage access.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have ACLs enabled
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 ACLs are disabled (BucketOwnerEnforced). Use IAM policies and bucket policies to manage access.

findings.description: This check verifies that S3 bucket policies are configured in a way that limits access to the intended AWS accounts only, preventing unauthorized access by external or unintended accounts.
findings.remediation_text: Review and update your S3 bucket policies to remove permissions that grant external AWS accounts access to critical actions and implement least privilege principles to ensure sensitive operations are restricted to trusted accounts only

findings.description: This check verifies that S3 bucket policies are configured in a way that limits access to the intended AWS accounts only, preventing unauthorized access by external or unintended accounts.
findings.remediation_text: Review and update your S3 bucket policies to remove permissions that grant external AWS accounts access to critical actions and implement least privilege principles to ensure sensitive operations are restricted to trusted accounts only

findings.description: Verifying whether S3 buckets have cross-region replication enabled, ensuring data redundancy and availability across multiple AWS regions
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have cross region replication.

findings.description: Verifying whether S3 buckets have cross-region replication enabled, ensuring data redundancy and availability across multiple AWS regions
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have cross region replication.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have default encryption (SSE) enabled or use a bucket policy to enforce it.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have default encryption (SSE) enabled or use a bucket policy to enforce it.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled.

findings.description: Ensure whether S3 buckets have event notifications enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Enable event notifications for all S3 general-purpose buckets to monitor important events such as object creation, deletion, tagging, and lifecycle events, ensuring visibility and quick action on relevant changes.

findings.description: Ensure whether S3 buckets have event notifications enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Enable event notifications for all S3 general-purpose buckets to monitor important events such as object creation, deletion, tagging, and lifecycle events, ensuring visibility and quick action on relevant changes.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have KMS encryption enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled using KMS.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have KMS encryption enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled using KMS.

findings.description: Check S3 Bucket Level Public Access Block.
findings.remediation_text: You can enable Public Access Block at the bucket level to prevent the exposure of your data stored in S3.

findings.description: Check S3 Bucket Level Public Access Block.
findings.remediation_text: You can enable Public Access Block at the bucket level to prevent the exposure of your data stored in S3.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have Lifecycle configuration enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Enable lifecycle policies on your S3 buckets to automatically manage the transition and expiration of data.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have Lifecycle configuration enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Enable lifecycle policies on your S3 buckets to automatically manage the transition and expiration of data.

findings.description: Check if S3 bucket MFA Delete is not enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Adding MFA delete to an S3 bucket, requires additional authentication when you change the version state of your bucket or you delete and object version adding another layer of security in the event your security credentials are compromised or unauthorized access is granted.

findings.description: Check if S3 bucket MFA Delete is not enabled.
findings.remediation_text: Adding MFA delete to an S3 bucket, requires additional authentication when you change the version state of your bucket or you delete and object version adding another layer of security in the event your security credentials are compromised or unauthorized access is granted.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have object lock enabled
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that your Amazon S3 buckets have Object Lock feature enabled in order to prevent the objects they store from being deleted.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have object lock enabled
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that your Amazon S3 buckets have Object Lock feature enabled in order to prevent the objects they store from being deleted.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have object versioning enabled
findings.remediation_text: Configure versioning using the Amazon console or API for buckets with sensitive information that is changing frequently, and backup may not be enough to capture all the changes.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have object versioning enabled
findings.remediation_text: Configure versioning using the Amazon console or API for buckets with sensitive information that is changing frequently, and backup may not be enough to capture all the changes.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have policies which allow WRITE access.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure proper bucket policy is in place with the least privilege principle applied.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have policies which allow WRITE access.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure proper bucket policy is in place with the least privilege principle applied.

findings.description: Ensure there are no S3 buckets open to Everyone or Any AWS user.
findings.remediation_text: You can enable block public access settings only for access points, buckets and AWS accounts. Amazon S3 does not support block public access settings on a per-object basis. When you apply block public access settings to an account, the settings apply to all AWS Regions globally. The settings might not take effect in all Regions immediately or simultaneously, but they eventually propagate to all Regions.

findings.description: Ensure there are no S3 buckets listable by Everyone or Any AWS customer.
findings.remediation_text: You can enable block public access settings only for access points, buckets and AWS accounts. Amazon S3 does not support block public access settings on a per-object basis. When you apply block public access settings to an account, the settings apply to all AWS Regions globally. The settings might not take effect in all Regions immediately or simultaneously, but they eventually propagate to all Regions.

findings.description: Ensure there are no S3 buckets writable by Everyone or Any AWS customer.
findings.remediation_text: You can enable block public access settings only for access points, buckets and AWS accounts. Amazon S3 does not support block public access settings on a per-object basis. When you apply block public access settings to an account, the settings apply to all AWS Regions globally. The settings might not take effect in all Regions immediately or simultaneously, but they eventually propagate to all Regions.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have secure transport policy.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption in transit enabled.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have secure transport policy.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have encryption in transit enabled.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have server access logging enabled
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have Logging enabled. CloudTrail data events can be used in place of S3 bucket logging. If that is the case, this finding can be considered a false positive.

findings.description: Check if S3 buckets have server access logging enabled
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that S3 buckets have Logging enabled. CloudTrail data events can be used in place of S3 bucket logging. If that is the case, this finding can be considered a false positive.

findings.description: Checks for S3 buckets with predictable names that could be hijacked by an attacker before legitimate use, leading to data leakage or other security breaches.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that all S3 buckets associated with your AWS account are owned by your account. Be cautious of services that create buckets with predictable names. Whenever possible, pre-create these buckets in all regions to prevent hijacking.

findings.description: Checks for S3 buckets with predictable names that could be hijacked by an attacker before legitimate use, leading to data leakage or other security breaches.
findings.remediation_text: Ensure that all S3 buckets associated with your AWS account are owned by your account. Be cautious of services that create buckets with predictable names. Whenever possible, pre-create these buckets in all regions to prevent hijacking.
